# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Redis/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource [ExposeProperties]
Aspire.Hosting.Redis/Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisCommanderResource
Aspire.Hosting.Redis/Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisInsightResource

# Exported Values
RedisModules.BloomFilter: string = "/usr/local/lib/redis/modules/redisbloom.so" # The Redis Bloom Filter module path for probabilistic data structures including Bloom filters, Cuckoo filters, Count-Min Sketches, and Top-K filters.
RedisModules.Json: string = "/usr/local/lib/redis/modules/rejson.so" # The Redis JSON module path for storing, updating, and querying JSON documents in Redis.
RedisModules.Search: string = "/usr/local/lib/redis/modules/redisearch.so" # The Redis Search module path for secondary indexing and querying of data stored in Redis.
RedisModules.TimeSeries: string = "/usr/local/lib/redis/modules/redistimeseries.so" # The Redis TimeSeries module path for efficient storage and querying of time series data in Redis.
